infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: FOAM uses your camera to take before and after photos of detailing jobs.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: FOAM needs access to your photo library to upload job photos.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: FOAM uses your location to find nearby detailers and navigate to job sites.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: FOAM uses your location to provide accurate detailer routing.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: FOAM uses your location to find nearby detailers and navigate to job sites.

plugins.photosPermission: FOAM needs access to your photo library to upload job photos.
plugins.cameraPermission: FOAM uses your camera to take before and after photos.
